title: epiphyllum × bauericardium
intro: Epiphyllum × bauericardium, also known as the Night-Blooming Cereus, is a hybrid cactus species that belongs to the Epiphyllum genus and is known for its unique flowers that bloom at night. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Epiphyllum × bauericardium include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's stems are often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
